---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document: 
    toc: false
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
    css: style_BB.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

\newcommand{\para}[1]{\left( #1 \right)}
\newcommand{\W}{\mathcal{W}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\newcommand{\C}{\mathbb{C}}
\newcommand{\Z}{\mathbb{Z}}
\newcommand{\E}{\mathbb{E}}
\newcommand{\Cov}{\mathrm{Cov}}
\newcommand{\Var}{\mathrm{Var}}

<video autoplay muted loop id="myVideo">
  <source src="014.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

<!-- Optional: some overlay text to describe the video -->
<div class="content">
  <h1>BB<font face="monospace" size=2> - blobbot - bobbot - buttblob - buttbutt - buttbot - ~~ :B <=8=>* ;/ </font></h1>
  <font face="monospace" size=2>
  <a href="BB.html">home</a> -
  <a href="BB_gallery.html">gallery</a> -
  <a href="BB_medium.html">medium</a> -
  <a href="BB_theory.html">theory</a>
  </font>
</div>

<script>
function myFunction() {
    document.getElementById("demo").style.color = "red";
}
</script>
